flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 37% at Thiel College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (773 vs 1.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Thiel College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (1.2k → 962).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Thiel College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (50.7% → 39.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Thiel College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.7k → $22.6k).
